instruction: Write a Common Lisp macro `inspect-when` that evaluates a value once, calls INSPECT on it only when a test is true (e.g. a debug flag), and always returns the value so it can be spliced into any expression.
original_failure_log_excerpt:
MISMATCH
EXPECTED: (LET ((#:G1 (FIND-RECORD ID)))
            (WHEN *DEBUG-MODE* (INSPECT #:G1))
            #:G1)
ACTUAL:   (LET ((#:G112 (FIND-RECORD ID)))
            (WHEN *DEBUG-MODE* (INSPECT #:G112))
            #:G112)

--- stderr ---
